display_label: Date of last meeting booked in meetings tool
semantic_meaning: Records the date of the most recent meeting scheduled by a contact through HubSpot's meetings tool. If multiple meetings were booked, this reflects the latest one chronologically. This is specifically meetings-tool activity, not manually logged meetings.
auto_population_source: Set automatically when a contact books a meeting through HubSpot's meetings tool. Shows the last chronological meeting date if multiple meetings are scheduled.
common_uses: Sales follow-up: trigger post-meeting nurture sequences based on booking date
Meeting funnel analysis: measure time from first touch to first meeting booked
Rep performance tracking: identify contacts who booked meetings vs. those who didn't
Re-engagement: trigger outreach for contacts who booked but then went silent

alternatives_to_consider.when_appropriate: When you want any communication type (not just meetings), including calls, emails, and chat
When you want broader sales engagement signals beyond just meetings-tool bookings
When you need to know which campaign drove the last meeting booking
